strengths: Successfully completed all required transfers between colored pegs
Demonstrated ability to work through the full task sequence
Showed persistence in recovering from dropped objects
weaknesses: Lost two objects during transfers, resulting in significant penalty deductions
Completion time of 280 seconds is well above intermediate benchmarks
Inconsistent object control during mid-air transfers

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on stable release and regrasp angles

drills.name: Lost-object recovery awareness
drills.description: Perform slow-motion transfer sets emphasizing controlled release points and backup positioning
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent object control during mid-air transfers

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Complete the task sequence slowly with minimal wasted regrasping to improve efficiency

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on eliminating lost objects through controlled transfers before pursuing speed improvements. The 20-point penalty deduction negated all time-based scoring.
